title: apocynum pumilum var. stenolobum
intro: Apocynum pumilum var. stenolobum, also known as dwarf dogbane, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its cardiotonic and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating cardiovascular and urinary issues. The health benefits of Apocynum pumilum var. stenolobum include reducing blood pressure, alleviating edema, and supporting kidney function. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
